mapper.sql: id, route_id, route_code, section_code, section_name, direction, start_stake, end_stake, length_km, pavement_type, technical_grade, lane_count, road_width, traffic_volume_level, adcode, manage_org_id, ST_AsGeoJSON(geom) AS geom_geo_json, remark, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM road_section WHERE ORDER BY route_code ASC, start_stake ASC
SELECT FROM road_section WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=false
SELECT FROM road_section WHERE AND geom IS NOT NULL ORDER BY route_code ASC, start_stake ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO road_section(id, tenant_id, route_id, route_code, section_code, section_name, direction, start_stake, end_stake, length_km, pavement_type, technical_grade, lane_count, road_width, traffic_volume_level, adcode, manage_org_id, geom, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{routeId}, #{routeCode}, #{sectionCode}, #{sectionName}, #{direction}, #{startStake}, #{endStake}, #{lengthKm}, #{pavementType}, #{technicalGrade}, #{laneCount}, #{roadWidth}, #{trafficVolumeLevel}, #{adcode}, #{manageOrgId}, ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326)NULL, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: UPDATE road_section SET route_id=#{routeId}, route_code=#{routeCode}, section_code=#{sectionCode}, section_name=#{sectionName}, direction=#{direction}, start_stake=#{startStake}, end_stake=#{endStake}, length_km=#{lengthKm}, pavement_type=#{pavementType}, technical_grade=#{technicalGrade}, lane_count=#{laneCount}, road_width=#{roadWidth}, traffic_volume_level=#{trafficVolumeLevel}, adcode=#{adcode}, manage_org_id=#{manageOrgId}, remark=#{remark}, updated_by=#{updatedBy}, updated_at=now() , geom=ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326) WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=false
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM road_section WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND section_code=#{sectionCode} AND deleted=false LIMIT 1
